emergency_routing_rules.fallback: Inform caller our team has been paged and will follow up as soon as possible.

non_emergency_routing_rules: Collect name, phone number, and description. Confirm follow-up during next business hours. Do not attempt transfer.

call_transfer_rules.message_if_fails:
If neither answers, tell the caller to contact local emergency services and that we're paging our team.

Onboarding Specialist: Transfer timeout?

Client: 30 seconds each.

Onboarding Sp

integration_constraints: Do not automatically create jobs/work orders in field service software
All job creation in ServiceTrade/ServiceTitan must be done manually
after_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller. Identify if emergency or non-emergency. If emergency: collect name, number, address, then attempt transfer per routing rules. If transfer fails: inform caller team has been paged. If non-emergency: collect details and confirm next-business-day callback.
office_hours_flow_summary: Greet caller professionally. Understand purpose. Collect name and callback number. Route to appropriate team member or log for follow-up.
questions_or_unknowns: Office address not confirmed (expected — demo call)
notes: Always confirm callback number before ending call
